raw.message: Parie et regarde les matchs de tennis en live sur l'appli avec Betclic ! 🎾📺

hook.summary: High-energy tennis action montage with neon visual effects.
hook.visual_action: Rapid cuts of tennis serves and court movement with glowing yellow trails and rhythmic transitions.

scene_flow: Fast-paced montage of tennis players serving and running with neon light trails.
Close-up shot of a tennis ball spinning with Betclic branding.
Transition to the main offer screen with promotional text and a call-to-action button.
on_screen_text: LES JEUX D'ARGENT ET DE HASARD PEUVENT ÊTRE DANGEREUX...
audience_proxy: Male sports enthusiasts aged 18-35 who follow professional tennis and engage in online gambling.
